title: Registers dumped as wires in VCD waveform
body:
I am using Verilator 4.038 2020-07-11 rev v4.036-114-g0cd4a57ad on Ubuntu 22.04.2 LTS. 

I compiled Verilator with trace enabled for an open-source RISC-V core (https://gitlab.com/shaktiproject/cores/c-class) , my generated vcd doesn't have any registers. In comparison, I get registers in my VCD when I generate it using VCS.  My generated VCD has no registers, so my power numbers are way off when I feed it to tools like Spyglass.

I have a zip file containing Verilator and Vcs VCDs for the RISC-V core. (Shakti C-class)


[cclass_vcd.zip](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/10902862/cclass_vcd.zip)
